"package": "com.eyeexamtest.eyecareplus", "enabled": true, "bounds": [1772, 389, 1352, 693], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Trainings

Exercises improve the eye blood circulation and focusing ability, strengthen the eye muscles, ease eyestrain and remove eye redness or dryness.

Warm-up
These trainings are a good starter for a set of eye exercises. They warm-up, relax and moisturize the eyes preparing them for the next exercises. 

Relaxation
These trainings relax your eyes and help to avoid pain, eye fatigue, redness and dryness. You will need to concentrate your vision at objects and follow the training hints.

Mind Brain
These exercises fall under the category of vision therapy.They train all aspects of your vision and the brain so that it keeps up with the vision. This way improving your vision can affect other abilities of the brain and improve them too. 

Eye muscles and focus
These trainings stretch and strengthen the eye muscles and improve eye accommodation by fixing visual positions. Long visual concentration on the same distance can make eye muscles lose their tonus and strength. Trainings help the eye muscles get into good shape and regain their power.", "resource-id": "com.eyeexamtest.eyecareplus:id/science_test_desc", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "975b84c",
